svg.text: Optimized Tree Representation for FPGA Implementation
✓ BRAM Efficiency: Consecutive memory access → Block RAM packing
✓ Predictable Latency: Max depth bounds worst-case cycles
✓ Pipeline Friendly: Array indexing enables loop pipelining
✓ Parallel Trees: Independent tree evaluation in parallel
✓ No Recursion: Iterative loop → Single function call
Each tree stored in contiguous BRAM blocks → Minimizes memory port conflicts
Total Memory: 20 trees × 5 arrays × 128 nodes × 16 bits = 126 BRAM_18K blocks (45% utilization)
